featureName: BUG-034-002: Telegram expense format helpers and fix-flow state machine not wired in production (~150 LOC orphan code under Scope 08 DoD claim)

executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: created 6-artifact bug packet under specs/034-expense-tracking/bugs/BUG-034-002-telegram-format-helpers-not-wired/ (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, state.json, uservalidation.md, report.md) documenting the production-wiring gap.
